channel.title: 2026-06-14 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-14 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Pd Single‐Atom‐Doped Cu3Co Quantum Dots With Optimized Hydrogenation Kinetics for Versatile Aluminum‐Nitrate Primary Battery With Synchronous Energy Harvesting and Waste Valorization
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Fuyu Liu, Kangyi Yu, Yinfeng Liu, Hang Yang, Xin Long, Arunpandiyan Surulinathan, Renfei Feng, Yu Zhang, Xian‐Zhu Fu, Bin Zhao, Jing‐Li Luo
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.
